markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new GrowthX POC and align on Q1 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**POC Transition:** Vivek Shankar is the new primary POC, replacing Jenn Peters.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Q1 Content Strategy:** Prioritize content for the new Private Equity (PE) vertical, even with low search volume, to capture high-intent traffic and dominate LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Website Overhaul:** The resource page is obsolete at 593 articles. GrowthX will propose a new structure (e.g., subfolders) to improve SEO and user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [**Next Sync:** Rescheduled to Tuesday to accommodate Mike's travel; will cover November MoM performance.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

## Topics

### POC Transition & Sync Reschedule

  - [Vivek Shankar is the new primary POC, replacing Jenn Peters.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [The next sync is rescheduled to Tuesday to accommodate Mike's travel to Australia.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [The sync will cover the November MoM performance review, which shows continued growth in impressions and clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Q1 Content & Vertical Strategy

  - [**Franchise Tax Articles:** These will be refreshed in the next two weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [**Rationale:** They are linked directly from the product, requiring a higher standard of accuracy and timeliness.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [**New Vertical Focus: Private Equity (PE)**](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**Challenge:** PE search volume is "infinitesimally small," making it a difficult target for traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**GrowthX Rationale for Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
          - [Search volume tools are often inaccurate.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
          - [Captures high-intent traffic from a valuable vertical.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
          - [Establishes Dinatech as the leading voice, capturing LLM visibility before competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [**Vertical Nuances:** GrowthX requested materials on how different verticals (e.g., startups vs. PE) use the product to create more targeted content.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Website & CMS Issues

  - [**Hidden Content Bug:** Some articles (e.g., Texas-related) are indexed in SERP but not visible on the site.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Suspected Cause:** A Webflow tile limit. Mike removed the limit and will monitor for a fix.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Resource Page Overhaul:** The current page is obsolete for 593 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [**GrowthX Proposal:** A new structure using subfolders and schema to improve SEO and user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [**Dinatech Response:** Open to recommendations; a full website redesign is planned for next year.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mike:**](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Provide materials on how different verticals use the Dinatech product.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Confirm the new sync time for next Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [Propose a new structure for the resource page (e.g., subfolders, schema).](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
      - [Monitor the hidden content bug with Mike.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [Prepare the November MoM performance review for the next sync.](https://fathom.video/share/vQR89NYawxxGypCWcxHNKDeVCKV_gzpR?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
